title: Ten-stem or five-element growth-stage direction

positions.summary: Treat every heavenly stem separately; Yang stems advance and Yin stems reverse from their documented growth branch.

sources.locator: 卷二・論天干陰陽生死

positions.summary: Treat paired Yin/Yang stems as one element cycle; retained as an explicit classical alternative but not emitted by default.

sources.locator: 卷二・論天干陰陽生死末段所記四大長生之說

default_policy.rationale: The selected table reproduces the explicit ten-stem life/death sequence and the supplied external regression's 星运/自坐 labels.

user_disclosure: Growth-stage labels use the ten-stem Yang-forward/Yin-reverse table; they are structural labels and do not determine strength or events.

sources.locator: 卷二・論天干陰陽生死
